title: Municipal Chamber of Rio de Janeiro
summary: The Municipal Chamber of Rio de Janeiro (Portuguese: Câmara Municipal do Rio de Janeiro) is the unicameral legislative body of the city of Rio de Janeiro. It was founded in 1565 by the Portuguese colonists.
text: The Municipal Chamber of Rio de Janeiro (Portuguese: Câmara Municipal do Rio de Janeiro) is the unicameral legislative body of the city of Rio de Janeiro. It was founded in 1565 by the Portuguese colonists.
